## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between HeyGen and growthx.ai teams to discuss content workflows, publishing processes, and performance reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/Natuk6vfXX4GWjFptMT6sNNskXp_1BFo?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content workflow: Multi-step process involving research, outline review, draft generation, and client-specific adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/Natuk6vfXX4GWjFptMT6sNNskXp_1BFo?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Publishing migration: Shifted from marketing studio to sanity.cms.agent.com for all new content uploads](https://fathom.video/share/Natuk6vfXX4GWjFptMT6sNNskXp_1BFo?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [Tools pages backlog: 12 new tool pages pending publication, blocked by validation issues](https://fathom.video/share/Natuk6vfXX4GWjFptMT6sNNskXp_1BFo?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
  - [Performance reporting: Weekly updates shared \~2 hours pre-meeting; open to customization based on HeyGen's needs](https://fathom.video/share/Natuk6vfXX4GWjFptMT6sNNskXp_1BFo?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)

## Topics

### Content Workflow Overview

  - [Multi-step process: researcher → outline → first draft → feedback/adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/Natuk6vfXX4GWjFptMT6sNNskXp_1BFo?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Client-specific elements: localization, internal linking, connected to a grid](https://fathom.video/share/Natuk6vfXX4GWjFptMT6sNNskXp_1BFo?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)
  - [High-level workflow sharing possible, but detailed "secret sauce" requires internal discussion](https://fathom.video/share/Natuk6vfXX4GWjFptMT6sNNskXp_1BFo?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

### Content Publishing Migration

  - [New publishing destination: sanity.cms.agent.com (changed last week)](https://fathom.video/share/Natuk6vfXX4GWjFptMT6sNNskXp_1BFo?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
  - [Access via "Production" dropdown menu](https://fathom.video/share/Natuk6vfXX4GWjFptMT6sNNskXp_1BFo?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Previously published content on marketing studio to be migrated automatically](https://fathom.video/share/Natuk6vfXX4GWjFptMT6sNNskXp_1BFo?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
  - [Loom video guide created for new blog article publishing process](https://fathom.video/share/Natuk6vfXX4GWjFptMT6sNNskXp_1BFo?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)

### Tools Pages Publication Blocker

  - [12 new tool pages pending publication](https://fathom.video/share/Natuk6vfXX4GWjFptMT6sNNskXp_1BFo?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
  - [Validation issue: "reference document must be published" error](https://fathom.video/share/Natuk6vfXX4GWjFptMT6sNNskXp_1BFo?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Various internal links (use cases, blog articles) attempted without success](https://fathom.video/share/Natuk6vfXX4GWjFptMT6sNNskXp_1BFo?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
  - [Request for HeyGen to investigate, potentially record a walkthrough for resolution](https://fathom.video/share/Natuk6vfXX4GWjFptMT6sNNskXp_1BFo?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)

### Performance Reporting

  - [Weekly meeting topics with performance updates shared \~2 hours pre-meeting](https://fathom.video/share/Natuk6vfXX4GWjFptMT6sNNskXp_1BFo?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
  - [Current report: early-stage, basic metrics](https://fathom.video/share/Natuk6vfXX4GWjFptMT6sNNskXp_1BFo?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [Internal development of additional views (week-over-week, month-over-month, winners/losers)](https://fathom.video/share/Natuk6vfXX4GWjFptMT6sNNskXp_1BFo?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [Open to adjustments based on HeyGen's specific data point requests](https://fathom.video/share/Natuk6vfXX4GWjFptMT6sNNskXp_1BFo?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)

## Next Steps

  - [HeyGen to review possibility of sharing high-level content workflow outline](https://fathom.video/share/Natuk6vfXX4GWjFptMT6sNNskXp_1BFo?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Mariana to provide link to tools page with publishing error for HeyGen's investigation](https://fathom.video/share/Natuk6vfXX4GWjFptMT6sNNskXp_1BFo?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [HeyGen (Tony) to attempt publishing tools pages and potentially record a walkthrough](https://fathom.video/share/Natuk6vfXX4GWjFptMT6sNNskXp_1BFo?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
  - [Daniel to review newly-granted access to performance report](https://fathom.video/share/Natuk6vfXX4GWjFptMT6sNNskXp_1BFo?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [HeyGen team to provide feedback on desired data points for performance reporting](https://fathom.video/share/Natuk6vfXX4GWjFptMT6sNNskXp_1BFo?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
  - [growthx.ai team to continue publishing new content on sanity.cms.agent.com](https://fathom.video/share/Natuk6vfXX4GWjFptMT6sNNskXp_1BFo?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
